summaryGuide.editorHighlightText: Conduct comprehensive processing, integration, and in-depth analysis of audio files and multiple documents to generate high-value reports structured in a professional five-section format: Executive Summary, Key Business Analysis, Overview of Attached Document Data, Meeting Outcomes and Action Plan, and Strategic Action Recommendations.
summaryGuide.keyboardInputDescription: After switching to input mode, you can send your requirements along with audio and documents to the AI agent
summaryGuide.messageEditorDescription: After entering your requirements, the AI agent will comprehensively summarize combining audio, documents, and other content
summaryGuide.realTimeRecordingDescription: Live transcription and key point extraction. Generates full meeting minutes automatically.
summaryGuide.selectProjectDescription: You can select an existing project to initiate real-time recording summary
summaryGuide.startRecordingDescription: Start real-time recording directly, and you can also set the recording source to "Microphone" and "Computer Audio"
summaryGuide.uploadAttachmentDescription: Supports uploading audio files and multiple documents, deeply integrating information and intelligently extracting core summaries for you
summaryGuide.uploadAudioDescription: Upload local audio files for AI transcription and efficient content analysis.
summaryGuide.uploadAudioFileDescription: Initiate speech-to-text conversion and summarize and analyze the content
summaryGuide.uploadDocumentAndAudioDescription: Upload reference docs with audio to generate deep, context-rich summaries.
